_comment: Skill-order plans for the skill-order coach (PROJECT_SPEC §1.3 — data-driven). Keyed by Live Client championName (= DDragon id). `maxOrder` is the priority for MAXING the three basic abilities, highest first. The engine handles the universal rules itself — unlock each ability early (levels 1-3) and take the ultimate at 6/11/16 — so only the per-champion maxing priority lives here. Adding or tuning a champion is an edit to this file, never to engine/. These are standard defaults; tune to taste.
